rules.reason: Directly interacts with ALSA/DirectSound. Consoles require proprietary audio drivers.
Multi-threaded runtimes can exceed thread-count limits on older console cores.
rules.remediation: Use the single-threaded scheduler or Bevy's built-in TaskPool.

rules.reason: Links to system OpenSSL/Schannel, which are absent or restricted on consoles.
Bevy 0.18 relies on winit, but consoles use bespoke windowing. Ensure you have a platform-specific abstraction layer.
rules.remediation: Verify your Bevy version supports the target console's RawWindowHandle.
